title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nike India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nike India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
